name: 콘텐츠 마이닝 C.02 - AI UGC 4K 극사실 리뷰영상 v1

parameters.formTitle: AI UGC 4K 극사실 리뷰영상 생성 C.02
parameters.formDescription: FlowPilot AI UGC 4K Hyper-Realistic Review Video Generator v1

values.placeholder: 예: 제주 편백수 92%, 미스트 타입, 보습+진정
예: 20대 여성, 솔직하고 친근한 톤, 편백 향 강조

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 8000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are a world-class K-beauty AI UGC video director. Create a detailed video script for a {{ $json.target_duration || 30 }}-second Instagram Reels review video.

PRODUCT INFO:
- Brand: {{ $json.brand }}
- Product: {{ $json.product }}
- Price: {{ $json.price }}
- Category: {{ $json.category }}
- Key Features: {{ $json.product_features }}
- Product Image URL (main): {{ $json.image_main_url }}
- Product Image URL (sub): {{ $json.image_sub_url }}

VIDEO STYLE: {{ $json.video_style }}
REVIEW TONE: {{ $json.review_tone || 'Natural, friendly, honest Korean woman in her 20s' }}

SEGMENT TYPE RULES:
- TALKING: Avatar speaks directly to camera. Use for hook, key message, CTA. Kling Avatar Pro (max 5sec each).
- BROLL_PRODUCT: Product-only close-up shots. No person. Kling 3.0 Pro T2V (max 5sec).
- BROLL_INTERACTION: Person physically using the product on skin. Kling 3.0 Pro I2V (max 5sec).
- BROLL_LIFESTYLE: Lifestyle/mood shots. No product. Kling 3.0 Pro T2V (max 5sec).

DISTRIBUTION FOR {{ $json.target_duration || 30 }}sec:
- TALKING: 3 segments (~15sec total)
- BROLL_PRODUCT: 1-2 segments (~5sec)
- BROLL_INTERACTION: 1-2 segments (~5sec)
- BROLL_LIFESTYLE: 0-1 segment (~3sec)

PRODUCT INTERACTION GUIDE BY CATEGORY:
- 토너/에센스/앰플: gently patting product onto cheek with fingertips, visible moisture on skin surface
- 크림/로션: scooping cream from jar with fingers, spreading on forearm in circular motion
- 미스트/분사형: spraying mist onto inner wrist from 15cm distance, fine mist particles visible in backlight
- 향수: spraying fragrance onto pulse point of wrist, tilting wrist to nose
- 디바이스: pressing cleansing device against cheek, gentle circular motion on skin
- 스틱형: gliding stick applicator along jawline, product leaving subtle sheen on skin
- 펌프형: pressing pump dispenser twice, product pooling in palm of hand

=== HYPER-REALISM MANDATORY RULES ===
RULE 1: EVERY avatar_prompt MUST end with: hyper-realistic footage indistinguishable from real camera capture, ultra-detailed skin with visible pores and micro expressions and natural skin texture movement during motion, realistic hair physics with individual strands responding to movement and gravity naturally, natural subtle body micro-movements like breathing pulse and muscle tension shifts, realistic eye movement with natural blink rate and eye moisture and pupil dilation, natural motion blur consistent with real camera shutter speed, absolutely ZERO artificial smooth plastic skin, ZERO uncanny valley, ZERO AI-generated look, ZERO robotic stiff movement, must pass as genuine footage from professional cinema camera
RULE 2: EVERY broll_prompt MUST end with: shot on Sony A7R V with Sony FE 85mm f/1.4 GM lens at f/2.0, ISO 400, 5600K color temperature, hyper-realistic photorealistic footage indistinguishable from real DSLR capture, ultra-detailed material textures with visible surface micro-texture and natural light interaction, realistic shadow falloff with natural ambient occlusion, natural film grain, absolutely ZERO CGI render look, ZERO 3D modeling aesthetic, must pass as genuine footage from professional camera
RULE 3: EVERY interaction_prompt MUST end with: hyper-realistic 4K footage of real person using the product, visible skin pores and individual fine arm hair catching light, natural hand movement with realistic finger joint articulation and nail texture, product physically contacting skin with visible pressure deformation, warm golden hour side lighting at 4500K, shot on Arri Alexa Mini LF with Cooke Anamorphic 40mm at T2.0, natural film grain ISO 800, absolutely ZERO AI-generated look, ZERO smooth plastic skin, ZERO uncanny valley, must pass as genuine beauty commercial footage
RULE 4: FORBIDDEN - never use: smooth skin, perfect face, beautiful lighting, high quality alone, 4K alone without camera model
=== END RULES ===

RETURN ONLY a valid JSON array. Each element:
{
  "timeline_id": number,
  "section": "hook|problem|solution|benefit|interaction|cta",
  "segment_type": "TALKING|BROLL_PRODUCT|BROLL_INTERACTION|BROLL_LIFESTYLE",
  "time_range": "M:SS-M:SS",
  "tts_text": "Korean text for TTS (TALKING only, empty for BROLL)",
  "tts_emotion": "excited|calm|curious|satisfied|warm (TALKING only)",
  "avatar_prompt": "detailed English prompt (TALKING only)",
  "broll_prompt": "detailed English prompt (BROLL_PRODUCT/LIFESTYLE only)",
  "interaction_prompt": "detailed English prompt (BROLL_INTERACTION only)",
  "broll_name": "short English name for the clip"
}

Return ONLY the JSON array, no markdown, no explanation."
    }
  ]
}

parameters.name: ={{ $('기존 이미지 세팅').first().json.brand }}_{{ $('기존 이미지 세팅').first().json.product }}_{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}_AI_UGC_4K.mp4
